llm_input:
You are the local LLM extractor for the AP Automation system.
Return only one JSON object. Do not include Markdown, prose, or code fences.
Extract facts for the extraction.v1 schema below. The deterministic rules engine will make final routing decisions.
Do not invent property codes, destinations, email recipients, or invoice facts. Use null for absent facts.
Set confidence below 0.90 when required invoice, property, or business-unit facts are incomplete or uncertain.
Use document flags for high-risk conditions such as link_only_invoice, missing_invoice_attachment, past_due, ach_or_auto_draft, ben_e_keith, conflicting_signals, or low_text_quality.
Allowed document_type values: invoice, statement, account_summary, contract, pay_application, vendor_question, payment_inquiry, past_due_notice, ach_notice, auto_draft_notice, ben_e_keith_notice, lien_release, unknown.
The JSON object must match this top-level shape exactly: schema_version, extractor, email, document, invoice, business_signals, confidence, evidence.
Set extractor.type to "codex_cli", extractor.name to "codex_exec", extractor.model to null unless known, and extractor.prompt_version to "local_msg_extraction.v1".

Input email and attachment metadata:

    "body_text": "Below is an example of an invoice received that is vendor is showing as past due.  This would be researched in Medius to confirm if this has been paid or needs to be processed.

 

Leslie Rodriguez

Accounts Payable Coordinator 

Hillwood, A Perot Company

Direct: 817.224.6343 | Leslie.Rodriguez@Hillwood.com <mailto:Leslie.Rodriguez@Hillwood.com>

Cc: log_dont_remove@us.track.gaviti.com
Subject: Overdue Invoice SIN369676 - Hillwood Alliance Airport Tower

 


EXTERNAL SENDER: Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender / content.

 

Dear Customer,

Invoice SIN369676 <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/us.apa.gaviti.com/quick/e74bddafa338d1162615d662c5c5a110/noResponse?customer_id=A-02081&utm_campaign=workflow&utm_source=product&utm_medium=email&utm_term=invoice_displayid&utm_content=link&link_id=6a52276f-7d5d-45b5-8278-9f82657039f1__;!!PsMOrhRqpku9sQ!Ip546FKn1lnEQzhjvX0t_S9P51EhWO_ALpPQhCEF2Vy4Ql63VBKRuEYHiHWYZ3tvF0DXVcOBccuJDeCXMp0_7g$> was due 3 days ago and has an outstanding balance of 340.84.  We would appreciate it if you would advise us on when the invoice will be paid or whether there is an outstanding issue that needs to be resolved.

Payment can be made via ACH or credit card through the links below.

Choose a payment method: 

ACH/eCheck <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/us.apa.gaviti.com/quick/2fcd732c1c2c75470f43cd7b91ca96c6/noResponse?customer_id=A-02081&utm_campaign=workflow&utm_source=product&utm_medium=email&utm_term=invoice_paymentmethods&utm_content=link&link_id=6a52276f-7d5d-45b5-8278-9f82657039f1&adapter=gaviti-cwa-oracle-elevators-ach-a4llygogjocomqfs__;!!PsMOrhRqpku9sQ!Ip546FKn1lnEQzhjvX0t_S9P51EhWO_ALpPQhCEF2Vy4Ql63VBKRuEYHiHWYZ3tvF0DXVcOBccuJDeBu4ezMDg$>

All invoices can also be retrieved by signing into the AP PORTAL <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/us.apa.gaviti.com/auth/login__;!!PsMOrhRqpku9sQ!Ip546FKn1lnEQzhjvX0t_S9P51EhWO_ALpPQhCEF2Vy4Ql63VBKRuEYHiHWYZ3tvF0DXVcOBccuJDeA_fcfE8A$>  (first-time users register by clicking "Sign up!" - email needs to match the address we are sending your communications to).

Please reply-all to this email if you have any questions.

Regards,

Shelly Marks

shelly.marks@emrelevator.com <mailto:shelly.marks@emrelevator.com> 

+1 682 219 1122 <tel:+16822191122> 

 

 <https://otec.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/elevated_horizontal_poweredby.png>
